markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Align on the website migration plan and URL structure.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Blog URLs are unchanged** to preserve SEO value. The `/ai-glossary/` subfolder is being consolidated into `/glossary/` with 301 redirects to improve user experience.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**A new `/educational-hub/` subfolder** will be created for new content, enabling A/B testing and personalization in ContentStack.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
  - [**A shared migration spreadsheet** will be used to audit \~500 GrowthX articles, informing decisions to keep, merge, or retire content based on performance data.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
  - [**URL structures for `Solutions` and `Resources` will change**, requiring a post-migration audit to fix broken internal links.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)

## Topics

### URL Structure & SEO Strategy

  - [**Blog Content:** URLs will remain unchanged to preserve existing SEO value.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [**Glossary Consolidation:** The `/ai-glossary/` subfolder will be merged into `/glossary/`.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=237.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Improves user experience and simplifies reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=333.0)
      - [**Action:** All `/ai-glossary/` pages will be redirected via permanent 301s.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=260.0)
  - [**New Educational Hub:** A new `/educational-hub/` subfolder will be created for all new content.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=372.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Enables experimentation (A/B testing, personalization) in ContentStack to optimize for conversion.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=407.0)
  - [**Content Culling:** Older, underperforming content (e.g., from 2020–2022) will be retired to improve SEO efficiency.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=482.0)

### Migration Spreadsheet & Audit Plan

  - [A shared spreadsheet will be the single source of truth for the audit.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Jo will add performance data (traffic, keywords) to Meaghan's existing list of \~500 GrowthX articles.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [**Action Categories:**](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
          - [**Keep:** High-performing content.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
          - [**Merge:** Overlapping content → consolidate into a single page.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
          - [**Retire:** Underperforming content.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=984.0)
  - [**Internal Link Audit:** A post-migration crawl (Screaming Frog) will identify and fix broken links.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1202.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Necessary due to URL changes in `Solutions` and `Resources`.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1024.0)

### Future URL Changes (Post-MVP)

  - [**Resources:** URLs will be updated to include asset type (e.g., `/resources/report/`).](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1140.0)
  - [**Product Pages:** A parent-child structure is planned for better organization.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1287.0)
      - [**Example:** `/products/cloud-email-security/feature-x/`](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1298.0)
      - [**Rationale:** Prioritizes user experience over potential URL length concerns.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1453.0)
  - [**Solutions:** Pages will be moved under a new `/what-we-protect/` directory.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [**Rationale:** The current `Solutions` pages are mislabeled platform descriptions, not true solutions.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Meaghan:**](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)
      - [Share the migration spreadsheet with Jo.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=562.0)
      - [Provide the new URL structure for `Solutions` by Thursday.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Create a write-up detailing all final URL changes for the team.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1658.0)
  - [**Jo:**](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1700.0)
      - [Add performance data (traffic, keywords) to the shared spreadsheet.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=900.0)
      - [Send a migration status update next Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/hoN54sxcYa3Y82YctJZgDLcVhY7J85bS?tab=summary&timestamp=1740.0)
